title: theobroma bicolor
intro: Theobroma bicolor is a plant species of the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the white cacao or pink cacao. It is a close relative of the cacao tree (Theobroma cacao) and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Theobroma bicolor include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant can be used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to provide several health benefits, including improved cardiovascular health, reduced stress levels, and enhanced antioxidant defenses.
